---
title: "Hospital Cardiovascular incidence in Barbados"
author: Ian Hambleton
subtitle: "BNR CVD briefing, 2023"
date: 31-Oct-2025
sidebar: cvd
format:
  html:
    body-classes: bnr-briefing-page
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
---

::: {.bnr-utility-card .bnr-briefing-action-card .my-3}

### View other formats

Use the slide deck for meetings, teaching, or stakeholder briefings. The PDF version is designed for printing, sharing, and citation.

::: {.bnr-utility-links}
[Open PDF briefing](pdf/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Open presentation slides](slides/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1_slides.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

:::

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/why-this-matters.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/what-we-did.qmd >}}

The briefing focuses on XXX questions:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### XXX?

XXX

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### XX?

XXX

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### XXX?

XXX

:::
:::
:::

:::



## Headline findings

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Women</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">312</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Stroke cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Men</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">312</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Stroke cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Women</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">105</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Heart attack cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Men</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">141</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Heart attack cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

:::


## CVD Incidence

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  <span style="color: rgb(164, 22, 26);">Heart attacks</span>
  leave more deaths unseen than 
  <span style="color: rgb(139, 111, 180);">Strokes</span>
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/figures/cvd_incidence_annual.png){fig-alt="Line chart showing annual incidence rates from 2010 to 2023." width="100%"}

[Open full-size weekly cases figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/figures/cvd_incidence_annual.png){.small target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::
:::

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/results1.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  Hospital rates show a decade of rising 
  <span style="color: rgb(139, 111, 180);">strokes</span>
  and a persistent excess among men
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/figures/cvd_incidence_rate_ratios.png){fig-alt="Bar chart showing the proportion of stroke and heart attack cases under age 70 and age 70 or older, by sex." width="100%"}

[Open full-size age distribution figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/figures/cvd_incidence_rate_ratios.png){.small target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::
:::


{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_incidence_2023_v1/results2.qmd >}}

## Download the outputs

The briefing outputs are available in three formats.

| Description |  | Download |
|---|:---:|---|
| PDF briefing for reading or printing | {{< fa file-pdf >}} | [Download PDF briefing](pdf/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf){download="bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf"} |
| View and use our briefing slide deck | {{< fa display >}} | [Open briefing slides](slides/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1_slides.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| Excel workbook with data and metadata worksheets | {{< fa file-excel >}} | [Download Excel workbook](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/workbook/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.xlsx){download="bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.xlsx"} |
| Full public output package, including DTA, CSV, YML, PNG, workbook, and README files | {{< fa file-zipper >}} | [Download ZIP package](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.zip){download="bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.zip"} |


## Suggested Citation

> Barbados National Registry. *Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados: BNR CVD case-count briefing, 2023*. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Available at: https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-counts.html. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
